title: Body Glitch #388: Fast Hunger
topic: The body signal behind getting hungry at the same time daily
voiceover: It's 11 am, and suddenly we crave food. But why do we feel hungry at the same time every day? Is it because of our busy schedule or something else? Our stomach has a natural circadian rhythm that regulates hunger and digestion. The suprachiasmatic nucleus in our brain controls our internal clock and sends signals to the stomach.
